creator: peter.schuller@infidyne.com
text:
Note to committer: I'd be happy to take MAINTAINER on this if deemed
appropriate, given that it currently lacks one. The patch does not
make this change.

- Update to 20081217
  - Now hosted on Google code
  - Distfile now unpacks in subdir
  - Change name of temporary version of 'clojure' script to not conflict
    with directory from distfile
  

Added file(s):
- files/clojure-bin.in

Removed file(s):
- files/clojure.in

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
